description: The CTO of MegaCorp Industries is restructuring the 'Engineering' department into three specialized teams. Update Snipe-IT to reflect this new structure by creating the 'DevOps Engineering', 'Cloud Infrastructure', and 'Software QA' departments, ensuring they are assigned to the company 'MegaCorp Industries' and the location 'HQ - Main Building'. Reassign 'David Moore' (username: dmoore) to 'DevOps Engineering' and 'Isabella Thompson' (username: ithompson) to 'Cloud Infrastructure', designating each as the manager of their new department. Create user accounts for Robert Chen (Username: rchen, Email: rchen@megacorp.com, Password: Password1!, Department: Software QA, Job Title: QA Lead) and Priya Patel (Username: ppatel, Email: ppatel@megacorp.com, Password: Password1!, Department: DevOps Engineering, Job Title: Site Reliability Engineer).
